residuals.risk: Protocol behavior or security changes after the source review.
residuals.disposition: Profiles require an exact implementation pin and source re-review.
residuals.stop_condition: Reject a profile whose versions or reviewed source dates are absent or stale.

residuals.risk: Congestion, airtime saturation, hops and latency are topology-dependent.
residuals.disposition: No normative field-performance number; P1a-02 and later evidence packs must version scenario, load, topology and radio parameters.
residuals.gate_or_task: P1a-02 conducted and later field evidence
residuals.stop_condition: Do not promote performance beyond specified/simulated without exact evidence.

residuals.risk: Logically separated LoRa planes can still collide, desensitize receivers or fail together.
residuals.disposition: Require channel, airtime, near-far, co-site, antenna and filter plan in each radiating implementation.
residuals.gate_or_task: P1a-02 and implementation RF coexistence gate
residuals.stop_condition: No field profile without bounded coexistence evidence and congestion policy.

residuals.risk: Transport node identifiers or metadata are mistaken for incident identity or authorization.
residuals.disposition: The signed OpenBREC envelope and incident binding remain authoritative; bearer IDs never grant rights.
residuals.stop_condition: Reject semantic acceptance derived only from bearer identity or transport acknowledgement.

residuals.risk: Known default keys, shared credentials, counter rollback or downgrade enable impersonation and replay.
residuals.disposition: Forbid known defaults; require unique keys, persistent counters/nonces, revocation, pins and application signatures.
residuals.stop_condition: Fail closed on default key, unsigned envelope, nonce/counter rollback or undeclared downgrade.

residuals.risk: Bridging native floods or raw frames creates amplification, loops and cross-plane leakage.
residuals.disposition: Only authenticated OpenBREC envelopes cross adapters; stable IDs, TTL, deduplication, anti-loop and per-path receipts are mandatory.
residuals.stop_condition: Reject every raw-frame bridge or path lacking loop and duplicate controls.

residuals.risk: Emergency assumed-risk mode is interpreted as unrestricted spectrum permission.
residuals.disposition: Mode is bounded, dual-authorized, monitored, expiring and kill-switchable; it explicitly is not legal authorization.
residuals.stop_condition: No activation without every assumed-risk field; stop at expiry, threshold, validated alternative or incident close.

residuals.risk: Carry bundles arrive late, duplicated, corrupted, lost or without custody clarity.
residuals.disposition: Require signed content, expiry, stable IDs, deduplication, custody events and explicit late/conflict disposition.
residuals.stop_condition: Never silently discard or overwrite a late, duplicate or conflicting bundle.

residuals.risk: Readers convert reference preferences or prior simulation into a universal winner.
residuals.disposition: The normative set fixes global_winner to null and requires a per-mission decision with rejected alternatives and reconsideration triggers.
residuals.stop_condition: Gate fails if one bearer becomes globally mandatory or physical validation blocks publication.

residuals.risk: Other useful bearers are excluded or an optional standards mapping is overclaimed.
residuals.disposition: Maintain a replaceable extension registry; BPv7, IP, 802.15.4, cellular, satellite and LMR require their own scoped contracts and evidence.
residuals.stop_condition: No compatibility or conformance claim without a versioned adapter gate.
